violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Food safety Manager license is expired; license to be re-instated. Food safety certificates current. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Portioned salad dressings were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed; foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Unit was adjusted to a colder setting during time of inspection. Unit must be 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to placing TCS foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards and bottoms of prep tables have an accumulation of dust and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
